[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: iching_oracle QMDJ overlay design: agreed on the same-moment coupling between I-Ching (narrative/transformational lens) and QiMenDunJia (spatial/strategic overlay), reviewed oracle_advisory_bridge.gs to understand its 3-block prompt-caching architecture, drafted ICHING_QMDJ_EXTENSION.md as a complete design doc covering library choice (lunar-javascript from the 6tail family), client-to-GAS data flow, the prompt-structure extension that preserves the existing cache split, proposed new ORACLE_PROMPT_HEADER output sections (QMDJ configuration of the moment + Combined frame), the static QMDJ framework reference for the cached block, risks to design around (information overload, oracle-mashup coherence, naive auto-interpretation, modern-synthesis disclaimer), and a 3-PR implementation order. Added an OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry pointing to the spec. PR #107 squash-merged on agentic_ai_context.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
